tasks.subject: Task 1: Cache em memória no proxy Pokémon
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remover dependência de Redis movendo o cache para app/pokemon/cache.py (in-memory TTL), mantendo interface get/set(ex=).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["back/app/pokemon/cache.py", "back/app/pokemon/service.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd back && uv run pytest tests/test_pokemon.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["service nao importa app.common.cache", "sem import de redis", "tests de pokemon passam"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Remover banco SQL e módulos legados
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Apagar módulos legados, database.py, alembic; limpar config.py e pyproject.toml.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["back/app/config.py", "back/pyproject.toml"], "verifyCommand": "cd back && uv sync && uv run python -c \"import app.main\" && uv run pytest -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["modulos legados removidos", "config limpa + firebase", "deps SQL/redis removidas", "app importa e testes passam"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Firebase Admin + get_current_user
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Inicializar firebase-admin a partir de envs e prover dependência FastAPI que verifica ID token.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["back/app/firebase/admin.py", "back/app/firebase/dependencies.py", "back/tests/test_auth.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd back && uv run pytest tests/test_auth.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["import resiliente", "token valido retorna uid/email", "header ausente 401", "token invalido 401"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Proteger rotas de geração + conftest
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Exigir login nas rotas /image-generations/pokemon e /prompt; manter testes via override autouse.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["back/app/image_generation/router.py", "back/tests/conftest.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd back && uv run pytest -v && uv run ruff check .", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ambas rotas exigem auth", "conftest override autouse", "suite passa", "ruff sem erros"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Firebase client + user-service (frontend)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Adicionar dep firebase, inicializar SDK client e criar serviço que grava users/{uid} no Firestore.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["front/package.json", "front/src/lib/firebase.ts", "front/src/lib/user-service.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd front && npm run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["firebase instalado", "firebase.ts exporta auth/googleProvider/db", "createUserIfNotExists criado", "lint passa"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: AuthContext (frontend)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Estado global de auth: onAuthStateChanged, createUserIfNotExists no primeiro login, expõe {user,loading,logout}.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["front/src/contexts/auth-context.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd front && npm run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["AuthProvider onAuthStateChanged", "cria perfil no primeiro login", "useAuth expoe user/loading/logout", "lint passa"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: LoginScreen + AuthGate + layout
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Tela de login (Google); AuthGate libera wizard só após login; envolver app no layout.tsx.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["front/src/components/auth/login-screen.tsx", "front/src/components/auth/auth-gate.tsx", "front/src/app/layout.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd front && npm run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["AuthGate spinner/login/children", "LoginScreen signInWithPopup", "layout envolve AuthProvider+AuthGate", "lint passa"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Token nas chamadas + logout no header
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Enviar ID token nas requisições de geração e adicionar usuário/logout ao AppHeader.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["front/src/features/image-forge/lib/image-generation-api.ts", "front/src/features/image-forge/components/app-header.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd front && npm run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["generateImage anexa Bearer", "erro claro sem token", "header mostra usuario e logout", "lint passa"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Atualizar CLAUDE.md (back e front)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Alinhar back/CLAUDE.md e front/CLAUDE.md à nova realidade (auth Firebase, sem banco SQL).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["back/CLAUDE.md", "front/CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "git diff --stat back/CLAUDE.md front/CLAUDE.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["back doc auth Firebase + env novas", "front doc login Google + AuthGate", "comandos migracao removidos"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```
